form.title: Get in touch
form.lede: Reach out for a consultation, a second opinion, or guidance on the international patient process.
form.successToast: Your message was received (this site is a portfolio sample — no real submission is made).

validation.phoneRequired: Please enter a valid phone number.
validation.emailRequired: Please enter a valid email address.

international.title: International Patients
international.body: For patients arriving from abroad we coordinate video consultations, airport transfer, accommodation, EN/DE on-site translators, and post-operative telemedicine follow-up — end to end.
